title: No More Elytra
description: No More Elytra is a minimalist Minecraft mod that removes just one thing: the Elytra from end ships. That’s it—no other features, no gameplay changes, no added commands.
body: No More Elytra No More Elytra is a minimalist Minecraft mod that removes just one thing: the Elytra from end ships. That’s it—no other features, no gameplay changes, no added commands.
